devdoc.details: This precompile provides native-speed verification of blockchain queries using Merkle proofs and continuity chains.

verifyQuery((uint64,uint64,uint64,(uint6.details: This is a view function that performs native verification at runtime speed

params.continuity_chain: Chain of block attestations for continuity verification
params.merkle_proof: Merkle proof for transaction inclusion in the block
params.query: The query specification defining what data to retrieve
params.tx_data: Raw transaction data to verify and extract from

returns.result: Verification result containing status and extracted data segments

devdoc.title: INativeQueryVerifier
